case_title: LESLIE SMITH VS. ANDREA SANTOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-26-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
